where_to_eat.name: Ms. Mae's
where_to_eat.description: A local bar in New Orleans where visitors can grab a drink and enjoy the casual neighborhood atmosphere that makes the city special.

where_to_eat.name: Cochon
where_to_eat.description: A notable restaurant in New Orleans where you might encounter the city's unique characters and eclectic crowd, popular for dining before major events like Mardi Gras.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Neighborhood Streets and Karaoke Bars
off_the_beaten_path.description: Hidden throughout New Orleans are local homes and bars where you can experience authentic neighborhood culture, from taxidermy-filled living rooms to spontaneous 2 AM karaoke sessions with friendly locals.
